items.title: Nasa astronauts' moon mission delayed due to rocket issue
items.description: The mission to the far side of the Moon and back will be postponed after problems with were spotted with its rocket, a Nasa official said.

items.title: GB curlers denied Olympic gold at death yet again
items.description: Bruce Mouat's rink are unable to end a 102-year wait for a men's Winter Olympic curling gold - and vanquish their own disappointment from 2022 - as Ca...

items.title: Trump says he will increase his new global tariffs to 15%
items.description: After most of his tariffs were outlawed on Friday, Trump announced new global tariffs of 10% - which he says he has now increased to 15%.

items.title: Five taken to hospital after gas explosion at farm
items.description: All five are taken to hospital as a precaution following the incident, which involved a food truck.

items.title: What went wrong for England in nightmare defeat?
items.description: "Everyone has to take a look at themselves" - what went wrong for England in their record Six Nations home defeat by Ireland?
